meaning: n.(恐惧,寒冷等引起的)鸡皮疙瘩vi.起鸡皮疙瘩
examples: It was so cold I was gooseflesh all over.
It gave someone gooseflesh and he shuddered all over.
Why, I've got gooseflesh this minute, just thinking about it.
For the Halo faithful, this video may summon gooseflesh, and it makes the wait until November 6th seem like an eternity.
